Lingua

Changelog
Contributing

Appearance

LinguaDatabase-driven translations for Laravel

Install languages, manage translations, and switch locales — all through a beautiful Livewire UI, with zero deployments.

Get Started
View on GitHub
🗄️

Database-backed translations

All translations live in the database and are editable instantly — no file deploys needed. Spatie's laravel-translation-loader handles the loading layer.

⚡

Livewire + Flux UI

Reactive, real-time management interface built with Livewire 4 and Flux 2. Every action — add language, edit translation, sync — happens without a page reload.

🔄

Bi-directional sync

Import your existing PHP/JSON lang files into the database with one command, or export everything back to files for version control and deployments.

🌐

70+ languages

Install any locale from the Laravel Lang ecosystem with a single Artisan command. Language files, DB records, and translations are set up automatically.

✍️

Rich text support

Each translation can be plain text, HTML, or Markdown. The correct editor activates automatically based on the translation type.

↔️

RTL / LTR support

Arabic, Hebrew, Persian and other RTL languages are fully supported. Lingua stores and exposes the text direction for every language.

📦

Vendor translations

Manage package translations (validation messages, pagination, etc.) alongside your own strings, with built-in protection against accidental deletion.

📊

Progress tracking

Every language shows a completion percentage and missing-translation count so you always know what needs translating.

🧪

Fully tested

150+ Pest tests covering all Artisan commands, Livewire components, Blade components, helpers, and the complete facade API.

Released under the MIT License.
